hero.description: Enjoy a unique experience with the Quik app. Find the nearest station, pay with ease, and collect points with every refill.

features.subtitle: Smart features that make your life easier

loyalty.title: Loyalty Program
loyalty.description: Collect points with every purchase and redeem them for rewards and free services.

payment.title: Easy & Secure Payment
payment.description: Pay for your fuel and purchases from within the app quickly and securely.

locator.title: Station Locator
locator.description: Find the nearest Quik station and discover the services available at each branch.

offers.title: Exclusive Offers
offers.description: Get instant notifications of the latest offers and discounts tailored for app users.

howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps for a smarter journey

step1.title: Download App
step1.description: Available now on app stores for free on all devices.

step2.title: Create Account
step2.description: Register your details in seconds and start building your digital wallet.

step3.title: Go and Save
step3.description: Use the app for every refill to collect points and get rewards.

cta.title: Ready to Go?
cta.description: Join thousands of users and start saving time and effort with the Quik app.
